issues.title: Bundle a default font (Bebas Neue) so it works out of the box
issues.notes: Downloaded BebasNeue.ttf, added to config.py, updated text.py font paths

issues.title: Add singer avatar / thumbnail in corner
Custom color themes per lyric line
issues.notes: Color tags [color:#RRGGBB] in LRC now parsed and passed to rendering. Lines inherit active color until changed.

issues.title: Batch mode — process multiple songs in one run
issues.notes: Batch mode added: `karaokefx batch --input-dir ./songs/ --output-dir ./output/` processes all audio+LRC pairs with optional --workers for parallelism.

issues.title: Export as GIF (in addition to MP4)
issues.notes: GIF export added: `karaokefx gifify --input output.mp4 --output output.gif --width 480 --fps 15`. Two-pass FFmpeg palette generation for quality.

issues.title: Auto-detect BPM for better plain-text lyrics sync
issues.notes: BPM sync added: use `--bpm 120` to force a tempo, or leave at 0 for auto-detection via librosa. Beat-aware line distribution in parse_plain_text().

issues.title: Clean up sync.py — remove dead code and fix API
issues.notes: Removed LycLine alias, removed unused num_lines param, replaced +30s with audio_duration_ms
